name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: "enhancement"
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem or limitation this feature addresses.

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of the feature or improvement you would like to see.

## Alternatives

Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Impact

- **Affected Services:**
- **Breaking Changes:** (yes / no — describe if yes)
